verses.latin_vulgate: Mense tertio egressionis Israël de terra Ægypti, in die hac venerunt in solitudinem Sinai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּחֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י לְצֵ֥את בְּנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם בַּיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֔ה בָּ֖אוּ מִדְבַּ֥ר סִינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the third month of the departure of Israel out of the land of Egypt, on this day they came into the wilderness of Sinai:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmantena kuukautena Israelin lasten lähtemisestä Egyptin maalta, tulivat he sinä päivänä Sinain korpeen.
verses.king_james: In the third month, when the children of Israel were gone forth out of the land of Egypt, the same day came they into the wilderness of Sinai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam profecti de Raphidim, et pervenientes usque in desertum Sinai, castrametati sunt in eodem loco, ibique Israël fixit tentoria e regione montis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֣וּ מֵרְפִידִ֗ים וַיָּבֹ֙אוּ֙ מִדְבַּ֣ר סִינַ֔י וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וַיִּֽחַן־שָׁ֥ם יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל נֶ֥גֶד הָהָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: For departing out of Raphidim, and coming to the desert of Sinai, they camped in the same place, and there Israel pitched their tents over against the mountain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä he olivat lähteneet Raphidimista, ja tulivat Sinain korpeen, ja sioittivat itsensä korpeen: ja Israel sioitti itsensä siihen, vuoren kohdalle.
verses.king_james: For they were departed from Rephidim, and were come to the desert of Sinai, and had pitched in the wilderness; and there Israel camped before the mount.

verses.latin_vulgate: Moyses autem ascendit ad Deum : vocavitque eum Dominus de monte, et ait : Hæc dices domui Jacob, et annuntiabis filiis Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֹשֶׁ֥ה עָלָ֖ה אֶל־הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֵלָ֤יו יְהֹוָה֙ מִן־הָהָ֣ר לֵאמֹ֔ר כֹּ֤ה תֹאמַר֙ לְבֵ֣ית יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְתַגֵּ֖יד לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses went up to God; and the Lord called unto him from the mountain, and said: Thus shalt thou say to the house of Jacob, and tell the children of Israel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses astui ylös Jumalan tykö. Ja Herra huusi häntä vuorelta, ja sanoi: näin sinun pitää sanoman Jakobin huoneelle, ja Israelin lapsille ilmoittaman.
verses.king_james: And Moses went up unto God, and the Lord called unto him out of the mountain, saying, Thus shalt thou say to the house of Jacob, and tell the children of Israel;

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos ipsi vidistis quæ fecerim Ægyptiis, quomodo portaverim vos super alas aquilarum, et assumpserim mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתֶּ֣ם רְאִיתֶ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֖יתִי לְמִצְרָ֑יִם וָאֶשָּׂ֤א אֶתְכֶם֙ עַל־כַּנְפֵ֣י נְשָׁרִ֔ים וָאָבִ֥א אֶתְכֶ֖ם אֵלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: You have seen what I have done to the Egyptians, how I have carried you upon the wings of eagles, and have taken you to myself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te olette nähneet, mitä minä Egyptiläisille tehnyt olen: ja kuinka minä olen teitä kantanut kotkan siivillä, ja olen saattanut teidät minun tyköni.
verses.king_james: Ye have seen what I did unto the Egyptians, and how I bare you on eagles’ wings, and brought you unto myself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si ergo audieritis vocem meam, et custodieritis pactum meum, eritis mihi in peculium de cunctis populis : mea est enim omnis terra :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה אִם־שָׁמ֤וֹעַ תִּשְׁמְעוּ֙ בְּקֹלִ֔י וּשְׁמַרְתֶּ֖ם אֶת־בְּרִיתִ֑י וִהְיִ֨יתֶם לִ֤י סְגֻלָּה֙ מִכׇּל־הָ֣עַמִּ֔ים כִּי־לִ֖י כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: If therefore you will hear my voice, and keep my covenant, you shall be my peculiar possession above all people: for all the earth is mine.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jos te siis minun ääneni ahkerasti kuulette, ja pidätte minun liittoni, niin teidän pitää oleman minulle kallis omaisuus kaikista kansoista, vaikka muutoin koko maa on minun.
verses.king_james: Now therefore, if ye will obey my voice indeed, and keep my covenant, then ye shall be a peculiar treasure unto me above all people: for all the earth is mine:

verses.latin_vulgate: et vos eritis mihi in regnum sacerdotale, et gens sancta. Hæc sunt verba quæ loqueris ad filios Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתֶּ֧ם תִּהְיוּ־לִ֛י מַמְלֶ֥כֶת כֹּהֲנִ֖ים וְג֣וֹי קָד֑וֹשׁ אֵ֚לֶּה הַדְּבָרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר תְּדַבֵּ֖ר אֶל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you shall be to me a priestly kingdom, and a holy nation. These are the words thou shalt speak to the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teidän pitää oleman minulle papillinen valtakunta ja pyhä kansa. Nämä ovat ne sanat, jotka sinun pitää Israelin lapsille, sanoman.
verses.king_james: And ye shall be unto me a kingdom of priests, and an holy nation. These are the words which thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venit Moyses : et convocatis majoribus natu populi, exposuit omnes sermones quos mandaverat Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣א מֹשֶׁ֔ה וַיִּקְרָ֖א לְזִקְנֵ֣י הָעָ֑ם וַיָּ֣שֶׂם לִפְנֵיהֶ֗ם אֵ֚ת כׇּל־הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה אֲשֶׁ֥ר צִוָּ֖הוּ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses came; and calling together the elders of the people, he declared all the words which the Lord had commanded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Moses tuli ja kutsui kokoon vanhimmat kansan seasta, ja jutteli heille kaikki sanat, jotka Herra hänen käskenyt oli.
verses.king_james: And Moses came and called for the elders of the people, and laid before their faces all these words which the Lord commanded him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Responditque omnis populus simul : Cuncta quæ locutus est Dominus, faciemus. Cumque retulisset Moyses verba populi ad Dominum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲנ֨וּ כׇל־הָעָ֤ם יַחְדָּו֙ וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ כֹּ֛ל אֲשֶׁר־דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה נַעֲשֶׂ֑ה וַיָּ֧שֶׁב מֹשֶׁ֛ה אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֥י הָעָ֖ם אֶל־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all the people answered together: All that the Lord hath spoken, we will do. And when Moses had related the people's words to the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki kansa vastasi yhtä haavaa, ja sanoi: kaikki mitä Herra puhunut on, me tahdomme tehdä. Ja Moses sanoi jällensä kansan sanat Herralle.
verses.king_james: And all the people answered together, and said, All that the Lord hath spoken we will do. And Moses returned the words of the people unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: ait ei Dominus : Jam nunc veniam ad te in caligine nubis, ut audiat me populus loquentem ad te, et credat tibi in perpetuum. Nuntiavit ergo Moyses verba populi ad Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֗ה הִנֵּ֨ה אָנֹכִ֜י בָּ֣א אֵלֶ֘יךָ֮ בְּעַ֣ב הֶֽעָנָן֒ בַּעֲב֞וּר יִשְׁמַ֤ע הָעָם֙ בְּדַבְּרִ֣י עִמָּ֔ךְ וְגַם־בְּךָ֖ יַאֲמִ֣ינוּ לְעוֹלָ֑ם וַיַּגֵּ֥ד מֹשֶׁ֛ה אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֥י הָעָ֖ם אֶל־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord said to him: Lo, now will I come to thee in the darkness of a cloud, that the people may hear me speaking to thee, and may believe thee for ever. And Moses told the words of the people to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra sanoi Mosekselle: katso, minä tulen sinun tykös paksussa pilvessä, että kansa kuulee minun puhuvan sinun kanssas, ja uskoo sinua ijankaikkisesti. Ja Moses ilmoitti Herralle kansan puheen.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Lo, I come unto thee in a thick cloud, that the people may hear when I speak with thee, and believe thee for ever. And Moses told the words of the people unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dixit ei : Vade ad populum, et sanctifica illos hodie, et cras, laventque vestimenta sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֤ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁה֙ לֵ֣ךְ אֶל־הָעָ֔ם וְקִדַּשְׁתָּ֥ם הַיּ֖וֹם וּמָחָ֑ר וְכִבְּס֖וּ שִׂמְלֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said to him: Go to the people, and sanctify them to day, and to morrow, and let them wash their garments.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Mosekselle: mene kansan tykö, ja pyhitä heitä tänäpänä ja huomenna: että he vaatteensa pesisivät.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Go unto the people, and sanctify them to day and to morrow, and let them wash their clothes,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sint parati in diem tertium : in die enim tertia descendet Dominus coram omni plebe super montem Sinai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָי֥וּ נְכֹנִ֖ים לַיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֑י כִּ֣י ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַשְּׁלִשִׁ֗י יֵרֵ֧ד יְהֹוָ֛ה לְעֵינֵ֥י כׇל־הָעָ֖ם עַל־הַ֥ר סִינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And let them be ready against the third day; for on the third day the Lord will come down in the sight of all the people, upon Mount Sinai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olisivat kolmantena päivänä valmiit; sillä kolmantena päivänä Herra on astuva alas kaiken kansan eteen Sinain vuorelle.
verses.king_james: And be ready against the third day: for the third day the Lord will come down in the sight of all the people upon mount Sinai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituesque terminos populo per circuitum, et dices ad eos : Cavete ne ascendatis in montem, nec tangatis fines illius : omnis qui tetigerit montem, morte morietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִגְבַּלְתָּ֤ אֶת־הָעָם֙ סָבִ֣יב לֵאמֹ֔ר הִשָּׁמְר֥וּ לָכֶ֛ם עֲל֥וֹת בָּהָ֖ר וּנְגֹ֣עַ בְּקָצֵ֑הוּ כׇּל־הַנֹּגֵ֥עַ בָּהָ֖ר מ֥וֹת יוּמָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt appoint certain limits to the people round about, and thou shalt say to them: Take heed ye go not up into the mount, and that ye touch not the borders thereof: every one that toucheth the mount, dying he shall die.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinun pitää paneman rajan kansan ympärille, sanoen: karttakaat teitänne, ettette vuorelle astu taikka tartu sen rajaan: joka siihen vuoreen sattuu, sen pitää totisesti kuoleman.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt set bounds unto the people round about, saying, Take heed to yourselves, that ye go not up into the mount, or touch the border of it: whosoever toucheth the mount shall be surely put to death:

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus non tanget eum, sed lapidibus opprimetur, aut confodietur jaculis : sive jumentum fuerit, sive homo, non vivet : cum cœperit clangere buccina, tunc ascendant in montem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־תִגַּ֨ע בּ֜וֹ יָ֗ד כִּֽי־סָק֤וֹל יִסָּקֵל֙ אוֹ־יָרֹ֣ה יִיָּרֶ֔ה אִם־בְּהֵמָ֥ה אִם־אִ֖ישׁ לֹ֣א יִחְיֶ֑ה בִּמְשֹׁךְ֙ הַיֹּבֵ֔ל הֵ֖מָּה יַעֲל֥וּ בָהָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: No hands shall touch him, but he shall be stoned to death, or he shall be shot through with arrows: whether it be beast, or man, he shall not live. When the trumpet shall begin to sound, then let them go up into the mount.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei yksikään käsi pidä häneen rupeeman, vaan hän pitää täydellisesti kivitettämän, eli kohdastansa ammuttaman lävitse, joko se eläin taikka ihminen olis, ei pidä sen elämän. Koska ääni rupee pitkään kajahtamaan, silloin he vuorelle astukaan.
verses.king_james: There shall not an hand touch it, but he shall surely be stoned, or shot through; whether it be beast or man, it shall not live: when the trumpet soundeth long, they shall come up to the mount.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descenditque Moyses de monte ad populum, et sanctificavit eum. Cumque lavissent vestimenta sua,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֧רֶד מֹשֶׁ֛ה מִן־הָהָ֖ר אֶל־הָעָ֑ם וַיְקַדֵּשׁ֙ אֶת־הָעָ֔ם וַֽיְכַבְּס֖וּ שִׂמְלֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses came down from the mount to the people, and sanctified them. And when they had washed their garments,
verses.finnish_biblia: Moses astui vuorelta kansan tykö, ja pyhitti heitä: ja he pesivät vaatteensa.
verses.king_james: And Moses went down from the mount unto the people, and sanctified the people; and they washed their clothes.

verses.latin_vulgate: ait ad eos : Estote parati in diem tertium, et ne appropinquetis uxoribus vestris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֶל־הָעָ֔ם הֱי֥וּ נְכֹנִ֖ים לִשְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֑ים אַֽל־תִּגְּשׁ֖וּ אֶל־אִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He said to them: Be ready against the third day, and come not near your wives.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi heille: olkaat kolmanteen päivään valmiit, ja älkäät lähestykö vaimoja.
verses.king_james: And he said unto the people, Be ready against the third day: come not at your wives.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jamque advenerat tertius dies, et mane inclaruerat : et ecce cœperunt audiri tonitrua, ac micare fulgura, et nubes densissima operire montem, clangorque buccinæ vehementius perstrepebat : et timuit populus qui erat in castris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִי֩ בַיּ֨וֹם הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֜י בִּֽהְיֹ֣ת הַבֹּ֗קֶר וַיְהִי֩ קֹלֹ֨ת וּבְרָקִ֜ים וְעָנָ֤ן כָּבֵד֙ עַל־הָהָ֔ר וְקֹ֥ל שֹׁפָ֖ר חָזָ֣ק מְאֹ֑ד וַיֶּחֱרַ֥ד כׇּל־הָעָ֖ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּֽמַּחֲנֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now the third day was come, and the morning appeared: and behold thunders began to be heard, and lightning to flash, and a very thick cloud to cover the mount, and the noise of the trumpet sounded exceeding loud; and the people that was in the camp, feared.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin kolmas päivä tuli, ja aamu oli, niin tuli pitkäisen jylinä ja leimaus, ja paksu pilvi vuoren päälle, ja sangen väkevä basunan ääni: niin kaikki kansa, jotka leirissä olivat, pelvosta vapisivat.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass on the third day in the morning, that there were thunders and lightnings, and a thick cloud upon the mount, and the voice of the trumpet exceeding loud; so that all the people that was in the camp trembled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque eduxisset eos Moyses in occursum Dei de loco castrorum, steterunt ad radices montis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹצֵ֨א מֹשֶׁ֧ה אֶת־הָעָ֛ם לִקְרַ֥את הָֽאֱלֹהִ֖ים מִן־הַֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה וַיִּֽתְיַצְּב֖וּ בְּתַחְתִּ֥ית הָהָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when Moses had brought them forth to meet God, from the place of the camp, they stood at the bottom of the mount.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses johdatti kansan leiristä Jumalaa vastaan, ja he seisahtivat vuoren alle.
verses.king_james: And Moses brought forth the people out of the camp to meet with God; and they stood at the nether part of the mount.

verses.latin_vulgate: Totus autem mons Sinai fumabat, eo quod descendisset Dominus super eum in igne : et ascenderet fumus ex eo quasi de fornace, eratque omnis mons terribilis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַ֤ר סִינַי֙ עָשַׁ֣ן כֻּלּ֔וֹ מִ֠פְּנֵ֠י אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָרַ֥ד עָלָ֛יו יְהֹוָ֖ה בָּאֵ֑שׁ וַיַּ֤עַל עֲשָׁנוֹ֙ כְּעֶ֣שֶׁן הַכִּבְשָׁ֔ן וַיֶּחֱרַ֥ד כׇּל־הָהָ֖ר מְאֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all Mount Sinai was on a smoke: because the Lord was come down upon it in fire, and the smoke arose from it as out of a furnace: and all the mount was terrible.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta koko Sinain vuori suitsi, siitä että Herra astui alas sen päälle tulessa, ja sen savu kävi ylös niinkuin pätsin savu, niin että koko vuori sangen kovaan vapisi.
verses.king_james: And mount Sinai was altogether on a smoke, because the Lord descended upon it in fire: and the smoke thereof ascended as the smoke of a furnace, and the whole mount quaked greatly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sonitus buccinæ paulatim crescebat in majus, et prolixius tendebatur : Moyses loquebatur, et Deus respondebat ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ ק֣וֹל הַשֹּׁפָ֔ר הוֹלֵ֖ךְ וְחָזֵ֣ק מְאֹ֑ד מֹשֶׁ֣ה יְדַבֵּ֔ר וְהָאֱלֹהִ֖ים יַעֲנֶ֥נּוּ בְקֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sound of the trumpet grew by degrees louder and louder, and was drawn out to a greater length: Moses spoke, and God answered him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sen basunan helinä enemmin ja enemmin eneni. Moses puhui ja Jumala vastasi häntä kuultavasti.
verses.king_james: And when the voice of the trumpet sounded long, and waxed louder and louder, Moses spake, and God answered him by a voice.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descenditque Dominus super montem Sinai in ipso montis vertice, et vocavit Moysen in cacumen ejus. Quo cum ascendisset,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֧רֶד יְהֹוָ֛ה עַל־הַ֥ר סִינַ֖י אֶל־רֹ֣אשׁ הָהָ֑ר וַיִּקְרָ֨א יְהֹוָ֧ה לְמֹשֶׁ֛ה אֶל־רֹ֥אשׁ הָהָ֖ר וַיַּ֥עַל מֹשֶֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord came down upon Mount Sinai, in the very top of the mount, and he called Moses unto the top thereof. And when he was gone up thither,
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin nyt Herra oli tullut alas Sinain vuoren kukkulalle, niin Herra kutsui Moseksen vuoren kukkulalle. Ja Moses astui sinne ylös.
verses.king_james: And the Lord came down upon mount Sinai, on the top of the mount: and the Lord called Moses up to the top of the mount; and Moses went up.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixit ad eum : Descende, et contestare populum : ne forte velit transcendere terminos ad videndum Dominum, et pereat ex eis plurima multitudo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה רֵ֖ד הָעֵ֣ד בָּעָ֑ם פֶּן־יֶהֶרְס֤וּ אֶל־יְהֹוָה֙ לִרְא֔וֹת וְנָפַ֥ל מִמֶּ֖נּוּ רָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He said unto him: Go down, and charge the people; lest they should have a mind to pass the limits to see the Lord, and a very great multitude of them should perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sanoi Herra hänelle: astu alas ja varoita kansaa, ettei he kävisi rajan ylitse Herran tykö, häntä näkemään, ja monta heistä lankeaisi.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Go down, charge the people, lest they break through unto the Lord to gaze, and many of them perish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes quoque qui accedunt ad Dominum, sanctificentur, ne percutiat eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֧ם הַכֹּהֲנִ֛ים הַנִּגָּשִׁ֥ים אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה יִתְקַדָּ֑שׁוּ פֶּן־יִפְרֹ֥ץ בָּהֶ֖ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The priests also that come to the Lord, let them be sanctified, lest he strike them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös papit, jotka Herraa lähestyvät, pitää heitänsä pyhittämän, ettei Herra heitä hukuttaisi.
verses.king_james: And let the priests also, which come near to the Lord, sanctify themselves, lest the Lord break forth upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Moyses ad Dominum : Non poterit vulgus ascendere in montem Sinai : tu enim testificatus es, et jussisti, dicens : Pone terminos circa montem, et sanctifica illum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר מֹשֶׁה֙ אֶל־יְהֹוָ֔ה לֹא־יוּכַ֣ל הָעָ֔ם לַעֲלֹ֖ת אֶל־הַ֣ר סִינָ֑י כִּֽי־אַתָּ֞ה הַעֵדֹ֤תָה בָּ֙נוּ֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר הַגְבֵּ֥ל אֶת־הָהָ֖ר וְקִדַּשְׁתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses said to the Lord: The people cannot come up to Mount Sinai: for thou didst charge, and command, saying: Set limits about the mount, and sanctify it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses sanoi Herralle: eipä kansa saa astua ylös Sinain vuorelle; sillä sinä olet meille todistanut ja sanonut: pane rajat vuoren ympärille, ja pyhitä se.
verses.king_james: And Moses said unto the Lord, The people cannot come up to mount Sinai: for thou chargedst us, saying, Set bounds about the mount, and sanctify it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cui ait Dominus : Vade, descende : ascendesque tu, et Aaron tecum : sacerdotes autem et populus ne transeant terminos, nec ascendant ad Dominum, ne forte interficiat illos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר אֵלָ֤יו יְהֹוָה֙ לֶךְ־רֵ֔ד וְעָלִ֥יתָ אַתָּ֖ה וְאַהֲרֹ֣ן עִמָּ֑ךְ וְהַכֹּהֲנִ֣ים וְהָעָ֗ם אַל־יֶֽהֶרְס֛וּ לַעֲלֹ֥ת אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה פֶּן־יִפְרׇץ־בָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to him: Go, get thee down; and thou shalt come up, thou and Aaron with thee: but let not the priests and the people pass the limits, nor come up to the Lord, lest he kill them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi hänelle: mene ja astu alas, ja astu ylös (jällensä) sinä ja Aaron sinun kanssas; mutta papit ja kansa älkään lähestykö astumaan ylös Herran tykö, ettei hän heitä hukuttaisi.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto him, Away, get thee down, and thou shalt come up, thou, and Aaron with thee: but let not the priests and the people break through to come up unto the Lord, lest he break forth upon them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descenditque Moyses ad populum, et omnia narravit eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥רֶד מֹשֶׁ֖ה אֶל־הָעָ֑ם וַיֹּ֖אמֶר אֲלֵהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses went down to the people and told them all.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses astui alas kansan tykö ja sanoi nämät heille.
verses.king_james: So Moses went down unto the people, and spake unto them.
